title: Jewellery from Gems
description: A resource pack that adds various rings and crowns that are made by renaming resources.
body:
### About
Rings from Gems is a resource pack that allows you to create jewelry as easily as renaming an item. Originally intended for the Stoneworks server.
___
### Instructions
Take any ore item (redstone dust, amethyst shard, diamond, emerald, lapis lazuli) and rename it in an anvil to whatever metal (copper, silver, golden, netherite) you want with 'Ring' at the end.
___
#### Example:
![An anvil renaming a diamond to 'Golden Ring'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7728073f96f188e013d8fdded7838bb369f9b4c3.png)
___
### Requires CIT Resewn or Optifine
Cit Resewn: [modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) Optifine: [optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)

#### Suggested Mods
- [modrinth.com/mod/better-anvil](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-anvil)
- [modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames/](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames/)
#### Suggest Datapacks/Plugins
- [modrinth.com/datapack/head-equip](https://modrinth.com/datapack/head-equip)
- [modrinth.com/plugin/anyitemarmor](https://modrinth.com/plugin/anyitemarmor)
___
#### Usage
Feel free to use in Modrinth modpacks without credit. If it is off platform please give credit by name and link to this project.
___
#### Future
- Support for various mods
- More jewelry
- Support for more versions
